meta.disclaimer: DEMO DATA FOR HACKATHON PROTOTYPE. NOT VALIDATED CLINICAL EVIDENCE.

evidence_maturity_model.name: Women Counted
evidence_maturity_model.description: Studies report how many women were enrolled.

evidence_maturity_model.name: Women Analyzed
evidence_maturity_model.description: Some studies report outcomes separately for women.

evidence_maturity_model.name: Life Stage Aware
evidence_maturity_model.description: Studies report menopausal status or life stage.

evidence_maturity_model.name: Hormone Aware
evidence_maturity_model.description: Studies report hormone therapy and hormonal context.

evidence_maturity_model.name: Precision Women's Evidence
evidence_maturity_model.description: Rich, hormone-aware women's evidence across studies. Evidence-maturity only — not a treatment recommendation.

studies.title: Atorvastatin cardiovascular evidence — sample study 1 (DEMO)
studies.relevant_evidence_passage: [DEMO] Sample study AMIRA-DEMO-001 reported cardiovascular outcomes separately for women (n=947, 32.4% of 2,919). Illustrative mock text — not a real research finding.

studies.title: Atorvastatin cardiovascular evidence — sample study 2 (DEMO)

studies.title: Atorvastatin cardiovascular evidence — sample study 3 (DEMO)
studies.relevant_evidence_passage: [DEMO] Sample study AMIRA-DEMO-003 enrolled 402 women (46.2% of 871 participants). A postmenopausal subgroup was described and outcomes were reported separately for women. Illustrative mock text — not a real research finding.
